name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.17.0 - BRAIN-KERNEL MIGRATION. Routes persistent state from machine-local ~/.codialectic/state.json to GitHub-backed workspace co-dialectic/status-state.json via brain-kernel. Adds brain namespace declaration, reads identity/skills-matrix.md + identity/handles.md via kernel primitives, and registers feedback-contradictions / persona-drift / calibration-drift linters. Carries forward v4.16 foundation invariant harnesses.
